Event: Steps up to protect teenaged Rip from hazing
Explanation: Protecting Rip improves Rip’s safety and cements Lloyd’s role as trusted protector.

Event: Protects other youngsters at the ranch over time
Explanation: Ongoing defense of youths helps them and reinforces his value on the ranch.

Event: Maintains high roping skill and keeps up with younger men
Explanation: His competence benefits his standing and contributes to the ranch’s effectiveness.

Event: Enters a brief May–December romance with Laramie
Explanation: Both get companionship/romance with no clear stated harm.

Event: Convinces Laramie to start dating Walker
Explanation: He sacrifices his own romantic situation while giving Laramie/Walker a relationship they want.

Event: Acts irrationally toward Walker after Walker hooks up with Laramie
Explanation: His irrational hostility hurts relationships and his own standing without helping him.

Event: Allows behavior to alienate him from other ranchers
Target: Lloyd’s own social ties / other ranchers
Explanation: Becoming ostracized damages his support network and group cohesion for no gain.

Event: Starts a fight after Walker offers a peace offering
Explanation: Rejecting peace escalates conflict, worsening his position and harming group harmony.

Event: Lets feud interfere with his work performance
Explanation: Work degradation risks his job and burdens others with no compensating benefit.

Event: Rip demotes Lloyd to low-man role until he recovers
Explanation: Demotion protects ranch efficiency and discipline while clearly harming Lloyd’s status.
Serious violence greatly harms himself (legal, social, disciplinary risk) and Walker without clear benefit.

Event: Rip initiates a brawl between Lloyd and Walker to settle matter
Explanation: Physical “settlement” may restore order for Rip/leadership but injures both combatants and sets harsh precedent.

Event: Spares Lloyd from being sent “to the train station” because of loyalty and history
Explanation: Sparing Lloyd benefits Lloyd and preserves a valuable employee but risks undermining strict enforcement of rules.

Event: Pawns rare, expensive belt buckle to buy a guitar for Walker
Explanation: He loses a valuable personal item to provide Walker a meaningful gift that aids reconciliation.

Event: Gives the guitar to Walker as a peace offering
Explanation: He gains restored peace/standing while Walker gains a thoughtful gift and reconciliation.

Event: Commits acts “up to and including murder” to protect John’s interests
Explanation: He secures John’s safety and his own position at heavy moral and physical cost to others.
